channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zikoko unveils second season of HER docuseries highlighting Nigerian women entrepreneurs
item.description: Zikoko, one of the main brands under Big Cabal Media, don release the second season of their docuseries wey dem call 'HER'. This season dey focus on five Nigerian women wey don sabi build strong busin...

item.title: Ugandan NGO ECOTRUST Empowers Communities with Conservation Financing at Nairobi Conference
item.description: The Business of Conservation Conference 2026 is happening in Nairobi from March 4-7 at Radisson Blu Hotel Upper Hill, bringing together leaders from across Africa and beyond to discuss how conservatio...

item.title: Clash During Holi in Uttam Nagar Leaves One Dead, Several Arrested
item.description: In Uttam Nagar, southwest Delhi, a clash occurred during Holi celebrations on March 4, 2026, between two neighbouring families who have had disputes for over fifty years. The incident resulted in the ...

item.title: U.S. Senator John Kennedy Praises Both U.S. and Canadian Teams After Olympic Men's Hockey Final
item.description: Following the recent Olympic men's hockey final in Turin, Italy, Republican Senator John Neely Kennedy from Louisiana publicly commended both the U.S. and Canadian teams for their performances. While ...

item.title: Woman allegedly steals car after meeting man at party, crashes in Verulam
item.description: A KwaZulu-Natal man’s night of fun turned into a legal headache after a woman he met at a party allegedly stole his car and crashed it into a house. The incident occurred in Trenance Park near Verulam...

item.title: Pakistan Railways announces fare increase due to rising fuel costs
item.description: Pakistan Railways on Saturday officially announced an increase in ticket fares for both economy and air-conditioned classes, following a substantial hike in petrol and high-speed diesel prices by the ...

item.title: Lacson Questions Credibility of Alleged P805-Billion Cash Delivery Claims by Former Marines
item.description: Senate President Pro Tempore and Blue Ribbon Committee chair Panfilo Lacson has expressed doubts over the credibility of allegations made by 18 individuals claiming to be former members of the Philipp...

item.title: Akwa Ibom Government Removes Controversial Video of Governor Eno’s Remarks
item.description: The Akwa Ibom State Government don remove one live-streamed video wey Governor Umo Eno talk about him critics and make some claims about the state’s money wey people don question. The video wey dem or...

item.title: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Directs Fuel Saving Steps in Government Offices Amid Middle East Oil Supply Fears
item.description: The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa finance department has issued a notification directing all offices under its control to adopt strict fuel conservation measures. This is in response to the Middle East crisis, p...

item.title: Pakistani Man Convicted for Attempted Assassination Plot Against US Leaders Allegedly Linked to Iran
item.description: Asif Merchant, a 47-year-old Pakistani man, was convicted in a Brooklyn court for plotting to assassinate former U.S. President Donald Trump and other American political figures. Merchant admitted inv...

item.title: Police Dismantle Mobile Phone Fraud Network in Morogoro
item.description: Morogoro police have successfully dismantled a notorious mobile phone fraud network, locally known as 'halohalo', after arresting ten suspects. The operation, conducted on March 3, 2026, in Magoha Ham...

item.title: Windsor woman who spoke against Khalistan extremism fatally stabbed in LaSalle
item.description: Nancy Grewal, a 45-year-old woman from Windsor, Ontario, was fatally stabbed outside a home on Todd Lane in LaSalle. Less than a week before her death, Grewal spoke to CBC News about threats she had r...

item.title: Military and Police Seize Weapons from Rival Moro Groups, Forcing Mass Evacuations in Cotabato
item.description: COTABATO CITY — On March 6, 2026, joint operations by the Philippine Army’s 602nd Infantry Brigade and local police seized 13 high-powered firearms from two rival Moro groups that have been clashing a...

item.title: Government Hikes Jet Fuel and Diesel Prices; Air and Rail Fares to Increase
item.description: Pakistan government has announced a major increase in jet fuel prices, raising it by Rs154 per litre, which means the new price is Rs342.37 per litre, up from Rs188.93. This 82% jump is part of a seri...

item.title: Mandelson escape rumour to British Virgin Islands likely stemmed from misunderstanding or joke, locals suggest
item.description: Peter Mandelson, a former Labour cabinet minister, was arrested on 23 February 2026 on suspicion of misconduct in public office, relating to allegations that he leaked sensitive government information...

item.title: India prepares to defend T20 World Cup title against New Zealand in Ahmedabad
item.description: As the ICC T20 World Cup final approaches on Sunday, March 8, 2026, India is set to defend its title against New Zealand at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. The stadium, previously known as Mot...

item.title: Trump Administration Expands ICE Detention with New Warehouse Facilities Amid Reports of Inhumane Conditions
item.description: After being paroled from a California state prison, Gustavo Guevara Alarcon was immediately taken into ICE custody, exposing him to conditions he describes as worse than his 20 years in state prison. ...

item.title: NSW government eyes western Sydney for second film studio with $100 million funding
item.description: The New South Wales Government is prioritising the western suburbs of Sydney as the likely location for its second major film studio, announcing an expression of interest process with $100 million all...

item.title: US Winter 2025-2026: Record Warmth in the West Overshadows Cold in the East, Ranking Second-Warmest Nationally
item.description: The meteorological winter of December 2025 through February 2026 in the contiguous United States presented a striking regional divide. While much of the eastern US endured prolonged frigid temperature...

item.title: Nigerian Army rescues 12 kidnapped victims in Enugu, arrests two suspects
item.description: The Nigerian Army, under Operation Eastern Sanity, rescued twelve people wey dem don kidnap for Ette Community, Igbo-Eze North LGA, Enugu State. The rescue operation happen on Friday after the Army re...
